title: Soma Ghosh
compiled_truth: Soma Ghosh is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-13 to 2001-12-11), Soma Ghosh sent 18 and received 81 emails, totalling 99 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (16), [Brian Kerrigan](people/brian-kerrigan) (7), [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (7), [Catherine Clark](people/catherine-clark) (6), [Cris Sherman](people/cris-sherman) (5).
